sizing_rule.note: Trade only when A > 1.0 (system expectation exceeds breakeven). Vince framework uses optimal f calculation via G^2 = A^2 - SD^2 to determine position sizing. Do NOT trade when A ≤ 1.0 as ruin is inevitable. Author does not specify numerical optimal_f or Kelly fraction values.

source_rule_text: Only trade if arithmetic mean (A) is greater than 1; profitability increases with more trades (N) when this condition is met, but if A is less than 1, ruin is inevitable over time.
